leadText: The Red Scale (Japanese: あかいウロコ Red Scale) is a Key Item introduced in Generation II. It is a scale from the Red Gyarados.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Red Scale can be given to Mr. Pokémon in exchange for an Exp. Share .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A scale from the red Gyarados . HG SS A scale from the red Gyarados . It glows red like a flame. B W B2 W2 A scale from the red Gyarados. It glows red like a flame. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A scale from a red Gyarados. It glows red like a flame. S V A scale from a red Gyarados that appeared at the Lake of Rage. It glows red like a flame.
